summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OLAP Assistant application. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly. Natural language processing with Claude Sonnet 4.5 integration successful.

design_issues.issue: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) but charts display correctly

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/ returns correct message
Backend API: POST /api/data/init initializes 960 sample records
Backend API: GET /api/data/summary returns complete data summary
Backend API: POST /api/chat processes natural language queries successfully
Backend API: Direct OLAP query endpoint works
Backend API: Sales by region endpoint functional
Frontend: Dashboard loads with all metric cards (Total Records: 960, Total Sales: $28.8M, Units Sold: 103,172, Avg Sale: $30,022.39)
Frontend: Query Assistant panel displays with 5 example queries
Frontend: Clicking example query fills input field correctly
Frontend: Chat functionality sends queries and receives LLM responses
Frontend: Analysis results display with charts and tables
Frontend: OLAP operation badges show correct operations (SLICE, AGGREGATE)
Frontend: Dark/Light mode toggle works properly
Frontend: Available Dimensions section shows regions, products, quarters, years
Frontend: Session continuity maintained across multiple queries
Integration: Claude Sonnet 4.5 LLM integration working via Emergent API
Integration: MongoDB data persistence and querying functional
Integration: Natural language to OLAP query conversion successful
